scope_note: Goal Kicker currently exports testing-policy summaries for this school. If official score distributions were not captured, the panel stays policy-only rather than inventing ranges.
policy: Princeton is test-optional for first-year applicants applying for fall 2026 and fall 2027 entry; Princeton says it will once again require testing for students applying for fall 2028 entry.

claims.claim: Princeton is test-optional for first-year applicants applying for fall 2026 and fall 2027 entry; Princeton says it will once again require testing for students applying for fall 2028 entry.
